productDisplayName: Myntra Women Multi Coloured Printed Top
description: Style Note Add a pop of colour to your summer wear wardrobe with this top from myntra. Featuring a colourful, all over print this piece scores high on style as well as comfort. Accessorise it with beaded bracelets and strappy wedge heels for an effortless yet inspired look. Product Details Multi coloured printed top with floral print, has a round neckline, half buttoned placket, cap sleeves, gathers from below the neckline in front and back and a vented hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Tumble dry low Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
